    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionParameterIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction parameters using white-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterIdentificationInsight, AdjustRobotControlAlgorithm
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated dashboard visualization for robot motion accuracy improvement"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionParameterIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from friction parameter identification for motion accuracy improvement"
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operator insights into physical relationships via dashboard visualization"
]

instance AdjustRobotControlAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust robot control algorithms based on friction parameters for improved motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot including motor, gear transmission, and cycloidal gear components"
]

instance RobotEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment for MABI MAX 100 industrial robot first axis digital twin"
    base:contains MABIMAX100FirstAxis
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No data transmission from DT to PT; digital shadow is a passive one-way data flow with no feedback to the physical system"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time processing of sensor data for continuous friction model updates during robot operation"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Passive digital shadow integrating SysML structural models, Simulink simulations, and live MQTT data into a unified dashboard for friction analysis with one-way data flow from physical to virtual"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), focusing on real-time friction monitoring and model improvement during robot operation"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data against measured sensor data; uncertainty addressed by combining white-box and black-box models for continuous improvement"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard; SysML for system modeling; Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) methodologies"
]
